untranslatable_reason: Multi-candle pattern (4-candle Concealing Baby Swallow) cannot be fully expressed using single-bar indicators and operators. The pattern requires: (1) detection of two consecutive tall black marubozu candles; (2) a third candle that gaps lower, recovers with tall upper shadow; (3) a fourth candle that completely engulfs the third candle (including shadows) and closes as black. This requires candle sequencing, gap detection across multiple bars, and engulfment logic that are not available in the allowed indicator set. Current conditions approximate SHORT bias based on downtrend context and bearish candle patterns, but do not capture the precise 4-candle pattern structure.
translation_notes: Entry conditions translated to SHORT direction based on 75% success rate in bear market context. Approximation uses: downtrend proximity (close < sma_20), tall black bodies (body > atr_14), minimal lower wicks, and recovery wicks (upper_wick > atr_14). Pattern-specific candle sequencing and engulfment validation require custom pattern recognition not available in standard indicator framework. Exit uses reversal of downtrend signal (close crosses above sma_20).
